title: Portable Windows Diagnostic Framework
tagline: Stateless forensic system diagnostics — no install, no footprint, no trust
problem: Diagnosing Windows system health in field environments requires installing tools that may not be permitted, may not exist, or may themselves be compromised.
solution: Stateless PowerShell diagnostic framework. Captures baseline snapshots, compares drift, flags anomalies. Single-file. No install. No registry writes. No external dependencies. Runs on any Windows system.
impact: v1.0 released. Validated on external environments. Used as a real diagnostic tool during IBM internship.
